titleStmt.title: SII 15.275: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 275. (B.K. No. 240 of 1927-28.) HONNAKAṬṬI, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On three pieces of a broken slab kept in the Māruti temple.
This is dated Śaka 1750, Sarvadhāri, Āśvija, Vijaya-daśamī. The details correspond to 1828 A.D., October 13.

It states that the village of Honnāyakanakaṭi located to the east of Bāgaḍikōṭi, had been deserted for a long time and that it was rehabilitated by Gopālappa, grandson of Rāyappa of Vaḍavāḍige, who also constructed a temple and had the old tank repaired. The officers of the East India Company who were pleased with this work had it recorded on stone. The record is in Nāgari characters and Kannaḍa language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīlakṣmīnṛsiṁho vijāyate
svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśake
1750 sarvadhāri saṁvacharadalli vaḍavāḍigī rāya
ppana mommaga gopālappanu bahudivasa vastī I
llade bāgaḍikoṭige pūrvabhāgadallidda honnāya
kanakaṭi yaṁba grāma vastimāḍisi Ā Ūrāge ta
mma hireru māḍida jīrṇa taṭāka bhāvi devālaya ka
ṭisi toṭamāḍi ya karma noḍi parituṣṭarāda kuṁ
paṇī sarakāradavaru Ītana dharma prasidhdhi Āgabe
bariśi śilāsthāpana māḍida sannu
lo Āsvīna vijayadaśapo . śloka .
ṭākamudyānamaṭapaṁ ca prapā tathā . Ete
nyatabhenāpi priya� nitarā hariḥ . 1 .
Digital edition of SII 15.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
